overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character with a lantern exploring a dark forest at night. The scene transitions from a dry rocky ravine into a heavy rainstorm as the character moves through dense woodland terrain toward a rocky cave entrance.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow rocky ravine holding a lantern to light the path

entered.detail: tall moss-covered rock face forming the right wall of the ravine
steep rocky incline with scattered boulders
narrow winding trail through the rocks
tall pine trees visible in the distance against the dark night sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow rocky ravine at night, illuminated only by the lantern they carry. The path is flanked by steep rock walls and scattered boulders, with a dark forest visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest edge transitioning from rocky terrain to woodland

events.description: rain begins to fall, starting as light drizzle and gradually increasing in intensity

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as rain starts, moving from the enclosed rocky ravine into more open forest terrain

entered.detail: open area with grass and low vegetation replacing the rocky ground
decaying logs scattered on the forest floor
dense tree cover becoming visible ahead

segments.scene_description: Exiting the narrow ravine, the scene opens into a forest clearing where rain begins to fall. The rocky walls fall behind as the character moves into an area with grassy ground and scattered fallen logs, with the rain gradually intensifying.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense temperate forest with heavy fern undergrowth

events.description: rain intensifies into heavy downpour with visible streaks illuminated by the lantern

agents.ego_description: walking through dense ferns and undergrowth in heavy rain, navigating between tall trees

entered.detail: massive pine tree trunks rising on both sides of the path
thick patches of ferns covering the forest floor
mushrooms growing on a fallen log beside the path

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the forest where heavy rain falls steadily through the canopy. The ground is covered with dense ferns and the path winds between massive pine trunks, with mushrooms visible on a fallen log to the side.

events.description: approaching large rock formation and entering narrow passage between boulders

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering a rocky cave entrance or narrow rock passage between large boulders

entered.detail: massive boulder formation creating a natural shelter from the rain
dark opening between rocks leading to an enclosed cave space
gravel and stone floor at the cave mouth replacing the grassy terrain

segments.scene_description: Leaving the dense forest behind, the character approaches a massive rocky outcrop that provides shelter from the heavy rain. The terrain shifts to gravel and stone as the character enters a narrow passage leading toward a dark cave entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dry, narrow ravine into a rain-drenched forest that eventually leads to a sheltered rocky cave. It begins with the character navigating steep rock walls and scattered boulders under the dim glow of a lantern, moving steadily toward a distant dark forest. As the character exits the ravine, the scene opens into a grassy clearing where a light drizzle begins to fall and intensify, shifting the environment from arid stone to damp woodland. The camera then follows the character deeper into the forest, where heavy rain pours through a canopy of massive pine trunks and dense ferns, passing mushrooms clinging to fallen logs. Finally, the terrain shifts back to gravel and stone as the character leaves the trees behind, moving through a narrow passage toward the dark mouth of a cave.
